code:
stateDiagram state "This is a state description of HR600 Workflow" as s2 [Groupware_ChatRoom] --> Login Login --> if_backupData if_backupData --> StartWorkflow: false if_backupData --> is_networkAvailable : true is_networkAvailable --> BackupToNetwork: true Note right of BackupToNetwork: There is still unsaved production data in the backup directory.
Do you want to transfer the data to the network drive now? is_networkAvailable --> RemainingBackup: false Note right of RemainingBackup: There is production data in the backup directory that has not yet been backed up.
The network drive for backing up the data is not available.
The data cannot be transferred. StartWorkflow --> FinishWorkflow FinishWorkflow --> [Groupware_ChatRoom] StartWorkflow --> MesDataToNetwork MesDataToNetwork --> StartWorkflow MesDataToNetwork --> Crash Note right of Crash: The transfer of the packed production data export file failed.
The data will be saved to a local backup directory.
Please make sure that the network drive is available and access is granted.
You can move the cached data to the network drive again the next time you start HRSoft2. Note right of Crash: The backup of the packed production data export file to the backup directory failed.
Please make sure that the backup directory is available and access is granted.
You may find the production data unpacked on the temporary directory TempArchiveFiles.
You can also initiate a manual export from the HRSoft2 archives.
If the problem persists, please contact Ersa service. Note right of Crash: An error occurred while generating the zip file of the production data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while generating the CSV data.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just created.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. Note left of Crash: An error occurred while querying the database for the last entry.
The generation of the production data is aborted.
You can continue the process normally until the end.
You can perform a manual file-based data backup to a network drive
by performing an export in the archive in the archive entry just generated.
If this problem persists, please contact Ersa Service. MesDataToNetwork --> FinishWorkflow [Groupware_SprintBacklog] Crash --> FinishWorkflow Crash --> Backup [Groupware_IssueTracker]
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HR600工作流创建一个状态图，核心场景是用户从群聊室登录后，根据是否需要备份数据来分支流程。主路径应该是登录后直接进入工作流，但如果需要备份，还要检查网络可用性。
明白了。那网络可用时数据备份到网络驱动器，不可用的话怎么处理？还有，这个备份节点需要给用户什么提示吗？
网络可用时走BackupToNetwork，要加一条备注提醒用户备份目录还有未保存的生产数据。网络不可用时走RemainingBackup，备注要说明数据无法转移、网络驱动器不可用。另外，工作流结束后要回到群聊室，形成闭环。
好的，主干流程已经画好了。我注意到还有一个MesDataToNetwork节点，这个和备份是什么关系？看起来它会和StartWorkflow形成循环。
MesDataToNetwork是生产数据导出到网络的步骤，成功的话直接结束工作流，失败的话会触发Crash。Crash节点很关键，需要处理多种错误场景——CSV生成失败、数据库查询失败、ZIP打包失败、备份目录写入失败，每种情况都要有对应的用户指引。
Crash节点的备注内容比较多，我整理了一下：左侧放CSV生成错误和数据库查询错误，右侧放ZIP打包错误、备份目录失败、以及网络传输失败。另外Crash之后可以回到FinishWorkflow或者走Backup分支，对吗？
对的。还有别忘了在图里标注Groupware_SprintBacklog和Groupware_IssueTracker，虽然它们不直接参与状态流转，但是属于这个工作流生态的一部分。最后在顶部加一个总标题状态框，说明这是HR600工作流的状态描述。
全部完成了。我检查一遍：从Groupware_ChatRoom登录，分支处理备份逻辑，网络可用走BackupToNetwork、不可用走RemainingBackup，主流程经过StartWorkflow和MesDataToNetwork，异常统一汇聚到Crash处理，最终都回到FinishWorkflow闭环。所有备注和辅助节点也都就位了。
